reach_why: Questions AI explanatory novelty, but this concern already exists in philosophy of science and AI evaluation.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links linguistic neutrality, benchmark bias, and underdetermination in assessing explanatory discovery.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via broader benchmarks, but core claim about beyond-human-memory discovery remains operationally vague.
explanation: Current AI evidence cannot decide whether outputs are genuine discovery or eloquent recombination.
